Say hello to Waddle, the friendliest quacker of them all 🧡

Illustrator: @tanviprabhakarr 
 
#LifeAtTitan

We're here to make sure you always have a duck-tastic day. 

Illustrator: @tanviprabhakarr 

#LifeAtTitan

She’s a high-voltage rebel in a low-voltage pond. Say hello to WTF. ⚡️

Illustrator: @tanviprabhakarr 

#LifeAtTitan

The learning curve? Still going up. ✨

The recent EDGE Learning Conclave 2026, hosted in Hosur, was not just any gathering; rather, it marked a monumental achievement by reaching a major 5-year milestone in developing capability within the Manufacturing & Engineering Ecosystem. Whether it was recognising the achievements of learners and trainers, sharing success stories, or encouraging 24/7 digital learning, the conclave carried a culture of never-ending development.

Many thanks to Mr Harish Bhat and MD Ajoy Chawla for their outstanding support! 🙌

#LifeAtTitan #LearningConclave

Diving into deep horology with this one 🏊‍♂️

Our new Zero Hour watch, Titan’s first 500M Professional Diver’s Watch has been forged in partnership with our official diving partner, PADI. Featuring a titanium-grade bracelet, the watch comes with Titan’s exclusive Aqua Bezel Lock, and a Super-LumiNova dial that cuts through pitch-black depths. 

#LifeAtTitan #Design #Innovation

Not your usual gold. 

This Akshaya Tritiya, Mia brings you jewellery centered around Sun-kissed Wellness.

Rings that change colour, details that glow, pieces that come alive on you. ☀️

Let us know your favourite in the comments! ✨👇🏻

#Design #DesignTrend

Design isn’t just what she does.
It’s how she sees the world.

This is the story of Beate Steinfeld who built and led the TrendLab at Titan’s Design Excellence Centre for over 15 years, shaping how we think, create, and evolve ✨ 

As she moves to Damas to shape new perspectives, let’s wish her well for what’s ahead 👇🏻

#LifeAtTitan #journey #designer

We loved mangoes so much, we recreated them in fine jewellery 🥭✨

With the earliest records of the mango motifs in jewellery coming from first century Taxila, the Aamra collection by Tanishq reimagined this rooted motif as a timeless jewellery collection featuring brilliant diamonds.

©️ Images of the collection were sourced from the Titan Archives.

#TitanArchives #Design #designinspiration #mango

Have you ever met a friend after years, only to pick up right where you left off?
Same laughter. Same comfort. Like no time has passed at all 🤗

Tag that one friend who’s always just one conversation away 👇🏻

#LifeAtTitan #Friendship

March set its own pace, Titan matched the rhythm ✨

Whether it was recognising the value of balance, welcoming new partnerships, engaging in experiential learning, or collectively achieving milestones, March has been all about growth coming from many directions at once.

See how each part contributed to a month of meaningful progress.

For the full story and more, subscribe to #TheTitanEdit. 🔗Link in bio

#LifeAtTitan

If you’re under the #Impression that it’s THAT time of the year, then you’re absolutely correct! 🏅😎

Impressions 2026 kicked off with a bang across Mumbai, Delhi, Kolkata and Bangalore, recognising our retail superstars! Congratulations to all the winners, and here’s to an even more thrilling FY27! 👏🏼❤️

#LifeAtTitan #Impressions2025

Sometimes, the best replies aren’t typed 🤭

We made a Titan sticker pack, ready for your next group chat takeover 🆘
Go get yours from the link in bio.

Would you like these as physical stickers? 👀

#LifeAtTitan
